changelog: Improved: redesigned the in-browser download button — a cleaner, less intrusive frosted control that reads well on both light and dark pages
Fixed: Facebook Reels and feed videos now grab the correct video link instead of a profile or page URL
Fixed: Facebook feed videos that sometimes showed no download button are now detected reliably
Fixed: YouTube left a stale, useless download button after previewing a video in the home feed — now removed
Improved: the download button now hides automatically when a video is covered by a dialog or popup
Fixed: starting a download while the app was still launching could open two "Add Download" windows — duplicates are now collapsed
Improved: download details now show the active connection count and estimated time remaining
Fixed: file paths shown in the download and details windows no longer include the Windows \\?\ prefix
Updated: bundled yt-dlp to the 2026.06.09 release
Added: a standalone clean-reinstall tool that fully removes Aither for a fresh start — optionally keeping your download history
